name: Strawberries for Remembrance Topping
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the strawberry jelly in a saucepan over low heat.
2. Use 3 tablespoons of the melted jelly to sandwich layers together.
3. Brush 1 tablespoon of the remaining jelly over the top layer.
4. Arrange strawberries on top.
5. Glaze with the remaining jelly.
6. Surround with chocolate curls.
